description_long: This is a modern, single-story house surrounded by a landscaped yard with numerous trees and shrubs. The structure features clean, rectangular lines and a flat roof, with large windows that allow for ample natural light. The property includes a driveway and a paved walkway leading to the main entrance, which is subtly integrated into the facade. The house is set back from the street, with a mix of open green spaces and paved areas for outdoor activities. The exterior is primarily finished in light gray and white tones, complemented by the green of the surrounding vegetation. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, openness, and a strong connection to the outdoor environment.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a landscaped yard filled with trees and greenery. The exterior is finished in light gray and white, with a driveway and paved walkways.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from an elevated angle, highlighting the front yard, driveway, and the main entrance surrounded by trees.
description_view_1: View 1 presents a side perspective, emphasizing the long, rectangular shape of the house and the row of trees lining the property.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the rear of the house, with more visible green space and a clear view of the backyard landscaping.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a look at the opposite side, showing the backyard, additional paved areas, and the arrangement of trees along the perimeter.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entryway with a flush door, no visible steps, and integrated into the facade, surrounded by landscaping and a paved walkway.
